name: Shurelya's Battlesong

active.name: Inspiring Speech
active.effects: Grants you and all allies within 1000 units {{as|30% '''bonus''' movement speed}} for 4 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Grants you and all allies within 1000 units {{as 30% '''bonus''' movement speed}} for 4 seconds.

simpleDescription: Activate to speed up nearby allies.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Inspiring Speech is a team-targeted active that grants bonus movement speed to the user and allies within 1000 units at cast time.
Timing note: Movement-speed buff is applied immediately on activation, lasts 4 seconds, and uses a 75-second cooldown.
